metadata.description: Standalone landing-page CRO agent for Claude Code. Builder-agnostic (Shopify, WordPress, Webflow, Squarespace, Wix, Framer, HubSpot CMS, custom HTML). Goal-agnostic (lead forms, ecommerce, signups, bookings, content unlocks, app installs). Form-agnostic (JotForm, Typeform, Tally, Fillout, HubSpot, Gravity Forms, native HTML, or no form). Instrumented funnel, conversion attribution bridge, ICE-ranked experiment backlog, weekly never-go-dark sweep.

plugins.name: landing-page-agent
plugins.description: Standalone landing-page CRO agent — onboarding questionnaire, multi-builder / multi-goal / multi-form-tool support, PostHog A/B engine, continuous experimentation.
